nasb.text: Let them give thanks to the Lord for His lovingkindness, And for His wonders to the sons of men!

esv.text: Let them thank the Lord for his steadfast love, for his wondrous works to the children of man!

cnv.text: 願人因耶和華的慈愛， 和他向世人所行的奇事稱謝他。

ccb.text: 他们当称谢耶和华的慈爱， 称谢祂为世人所行的奇事。

csbs.text: 愿他们因耶和华的慈爱， 以及他向世人显明的奇妙作为称谢他！
